My Landing Page Example
Download Resource
Copy funnel from ClickFunnels
Wuffoo Form
Download Resource
WHAT YOU'LL NEED
Landing Page #1 	- this is for your "sales page" - this could be any landing page platform really but we recommend Click Funnels	1.
Landing Page #2 	- used to embed your Schedule Once form	2.
Landing Page #3 	- used to embed your wufoo form & Standard Event pixel "Lead'	3.
Schedule Once 	- you'll need the paid version so that you can send SMS reminders	4.
Wufoo 	- this is a form tool	5.
INSTRUCTIONS
STEP #1 	- Build your Landing Page #1 (or copy this one into your ClickFunnels account)
Add your base pixel to page
STEP #2 	- Create your Wufoo form
STEP #3 	- Build your Landing Page #3 and embed your wufoo form.
Add the Standard Event Pixel 'Lead' to this page - save the link
STEP #4 	- Create your Schedule Once Booking form.
Make it redirect to Landing Page #3 (to do this click on 'Configuration' then 'Booking Form' and make it redirect to URL after 0 seconds)
Do not let is book out more than 4 days out (your no show rates will go through the roof)
Enable SMS reminders to leads 1hr before the call
STEP #5 	- Link the call to action button on Landing Page #1 to Landing Page #2
STEP #6 	- Create your ad (use example below for guidance)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 3 --

Create a conversion campaign
STEP #7 	- GO LOVE!!!
Spend AT LEAST $50-$100 per ad set before making changes
AD CREATIVE GUIDELINES
Don't hide the hook - keep it front and center in your headline	1.
Stay away from super "stocky" business photos, these don't tend to convert as well	2.
Don't use a call to action button	3.
Have "Book your strategy call with me: [link] in the copy of ad	4.
Add disclaimer to your landing page that the performance based model is for those with working funnels only	5.
IDEAS FOR UN-NICHED FUNNEL TARGETING
Run a lookalike from your leads or those that clicked	1.
Use the FB Page hack (see Targeting training) (ex: go to a business conference FB Page, try and find similar pages).	2.
Export contact list from LinkedIn of founders and business owners - create a lookalike from this	3.
IF YOU NEED LEADS FAST 	- If you are IN A RUSH to land clients, I would like you to launch two funnels 1. un-checked (so not targeting any particular niche but speaking to
generic pain points associated with running your own Facebook ads) 2. your niched funnel ....The reason for this is that certain niches can be small in numbers, meaning leads may not
flood in hard and fast initially (for example, Cosmetic Surgeons) so if you need clients to keep the lights on we need to launch you a second funnel that WILL poor leads in.
DON'T PANIC 	- Allow your funnel at least 7 days and $100 spend before you make any calls. You should be comfortable spending at least $100 -$150 to land a lead as these are
worth a lot more if converted. If you send me an email requesting guidance, please ensure you send through below document or stats on funnel health.
KEEPING TRACK OF YOUR FUNNEL HEALTH
Important Rules
Be willing to spend AT LEAST $50-$100 PER AD SET initially to land a lead, this will drop as ads optimise. Don't make changes until you have spent at least this amount	1.
Always split test between Desktop and Mobile - make sure to unselect "right hand column" from the Desktop placement	2.
support@cathowell.com
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
